title: Shiro Sagisus EVANGELION WIND ORCHESTRA
wikitext:
[]: Shiro Sagisu's "EVANGELION WIND ORCHESTRA"             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Sep 28, 2009 2:29 pm I know this is old news, figured I'd make a post about it anyways because I saw it was on the evastore. http://www.evageeks.org/2009/09/shiro-sagisu-evangelion-wind-symphony/ Looks like a bunch of eva music being performed by verious orchestras. Sagisu put together 2 of them and the other is the Kosei Wind Orchestra. This might be interesting, the 2nd CD's are CD-ROMs which looks like the scores in PDF format.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:05 am So I guess this is a 2-CD release like Symphony? Or a regular/speical edition release deal. I wonder if this will have Rebuild songs and series songs (S2 Works even)? I didn't see a tracklisting up yet. I might be interested in this CD, depending what's on it.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:21 am Hee, I'm always open to new versions of the soundtrack, and it sounds like this will have a more classical feel to it than some of the others (though nothing can compare with S2 works for including every piece of music in the series, or Symphony for bringing all the classical pieces together)

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Thu Oct 01, 2009 5:01 pm WOW another Eva CD release... no surprise here. Either Shiro Sagisu is a workaholic or these music releases sell! I'm interested in what exactly are on these. What's the difference between version #1 & #2?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 01, 2009 5:57 pm thedarkorb wrote: WOW another Eva CD release... no surprise here. Either Shiro Sagisu is a workaholic or these music releases sell! I'm interested in what exactly are on these. What's the difference between version #1 & #2?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:10 pm While the content is listed as tentative on Evastore there'll be: 5 new wind orchestra songs 1 new by Murata Youichi 2 new by Sagisu Shirou 2 remasters of (old, I believe) Eva songs 2 other songs Also, the CD-ROM will contain sheet music for all tracks. I believe all songs except the "2 other" will be Eva related. But there seems to be a difference between old and new Eva songs. Also, leading voice performance by Takahashi Youko.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:24 pm Ooh. Thanks for the headsup. I'm hoping the differences between both CDs will be posted soon, but what first came to my mind is maybe it's meant to be 2 seperate volumes like the Symphony CDs. Guess we'd find out soon enough.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Oct 02, 2009 11:10 am One will be an audio CD and the other a CD-ROM. For what I could understand, CD-ROM would have no music, just the "extras".
